```{r everything toghether}
####Neo 22###
Neo22_index <- merge(Neo22_NDVI_final[,1:7], Neo22_EVI_final [,1:7], by = c("Unit", "flight_number", "gdd", "julian", "temps5.26_mean", "cuml5.26"))

Neo22_index <- merge(Neo22_index, Neo22_GNDVI_final[,1:7], by = c("Unit", "flight_number", "gdd", "julian", "temps5.26_mean", "cuml5.26"))

###Neo 23###
Neo23_index <- merge(Neo23_NDVI_final[,1:7], Neo23_EVI_final[,1:7], by = c("Unit", "flight_number", "gdd", "julian", "temps5.26_mean", "cuml5.26"))

Neo23_index <- merge(Neo23_index, Neo23_GNDVI_final[,1:7], by = c("Unit", "flight_number", "gdd", "julian", "temps5.26_mean", "cuml5.26"))

####Urb 22###
Urb22_index <- merge(Urb22_NDVI_final[,1:7], Urb22_EVI_final[,1:7], by = c("Unit", "flight_number", "gdd", "julian", "temps5.26_mean", "cuml5.26"))

Urb22_index <- merge(Urb22_index, Urb22_GNDVI_final[,1:7], by = c("Unit", "flight_number", "gdd", "julian", "temps5.26_mean", "cuml5.26"))

###Neo 23###
Urb23_index <- merge(Urb23_NDVI_final[,1:7], Urb23_EVI_final[,1:7], by = c("Unit", "flight_number", "gdd", "julian", "temps5.26_mean", "cuml5.26"))

Urb23_index <- merge(Urb23_index, Urb23_GNDVI_final[,1:7], by = c("Unit", "flight_number", "gdd", "julian", "temps5.26_mean", "cuml5.26"))

####St.P 22###
StP22_index <- merge(StP22_NDVI_final[,1:7], StP22_EVI_final[,1:7], by = c("Unit", "flight_number", "gdd", "julian", "temps5.26_mean", "cuml5.26"))

StP22_index <- merge(StP22_index, StP22_GNDVI_final[,1:7], by = c("Unit", "flight_number", "gdd", "julian", "temps5.26_mean", "cuml5.26"))

###St.P 23###
StP23_index <- merge(StP23_NDVI_final[,1:7], StP23_EVI_final[,1:7], by = c("Unit", "flight_number", "gdd", "julian", "temps5.26_mean", "cuml5.26"))

StP23_index <- merge(StP23_index, StP23_GNDVI_final[,1:7], by = c("Unit", "flight_number", "gdd", "julian", "temps5.26_mean", "cuml5.26"))

```


```{r}
HTP<-read.csv("HTPMET.csv")
```

```{r}
HTP <- rename(HTP, Unit = observationUnitDbId)
HTP <- rename(HTP, Grain.yield = Grain.yield...kg.ha.CO_321.0001218)


Neo_22<-HTP%>%
  filter(studyName=="YT_Neo_22")
Neo_23<-HTP%>%
  filter(studyName=="YT_Neo_23")

Urb_22<-HTP%>%
  filter(studyName=="YT_Urb_22")
Urb_23<-HTP%>%
  filter(studyName=="YT_Urb_23")

StP_22<-HTP%>%
  filter(studyName=="YT_Stp_22")
StP_23<-HTP%>%
  filter(studyName=="YT_Stp_23")

```

```{r}
Neo_22 <- Neo_22[, c("Unit", "Grain.yield")]
Neo_23 <- Neo_23[, c("Unit", "Grain.yield")]

Urb_22 <- Urb_22[, c("Unit", "Grain.yield")]
Urb_23 <- Urb_23[, c("Unit", "Grain.yield")]

StP_22 <- StP_22[, c("Unit", "Grain.yield")]
StP_23 <- StP_23[, c("Unit", "Grain.yield")]

```

Complete data
```{r}

numeric_cols <- c("julian", "NDVI", "GNDVI", "EVI", "temps5.26_mean", "cuml5.26", "gdd")
StP23_index[numeric_cols] <- lapply(StP23_index[numeric_cols], as.numeric)
StP23_index1 <- StP23_index %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = flight_number,
    values_from = c(julian, NDVI, GNDVI, EVI, temps5.26_mean, cuml5.26, gdd),
    names_sep = "_"
  )
StP23_all<-merge(StP23_index1, StP_23, by="Unit")
StP23_all$Location<-"St. Peter 2023"

sapply(StP23_all, class)


StP22_index[numeric_cols] <- lapply(StP22_index[numeric_cols], as.numeric)
StP22_index1 <- StP22_index %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = flight_number,
    values_from = c(julian, NDVI, GNDVI, EVI, temps5.26_mean, cuml5.26, gdd),
    names_sep = "_"
  )

StP22_all<-merge(StP22_index1, StP_22, by="Unit")
sapply(StP22_all, as.numeric)
StP22_all$Location<-"St. Peter 2022"

###urb
Urb22_index[numeric_cols] <- lapply(Urb22_index[numeric_cols], as.numeric)
Urb22_index1 <- Urb22_index %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = flight_number,
    values_from = c(julian, NDVI, GNDVI, EVI, temps5.26_mean, cuml5.26, gdd),
    names_sep = "_"
  )
Urb22_all<-merge(Urb22_index1, Urb_22, by="Unit")
sapply(Urb22_all, as.numeric)
Urb22_all$Location<-"Urbana 2022"


Urb23_index[numeric_cols] <- lapply(Urb23_index[numeric_cols], as.numeric)
Urb23_index1 <- Urb23_index %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = flight_number,
    values_from = c(julian, NDVI, GNDVI, EVI, temps5.26_mean, cuml5.26, gdd),
    names_sep = "_"
  )
Urb23_all<-merge(Urb23_index1, Urb_23, by="Unit")
sapply(Urb23_all, as.numeric)
Urb23_all$Location<-"Urbana 2023"

###Neo
Neo22_index[numeric_cols] <- lapply(Neo22_index[numeric_cols], as.numeric)
Neo22_index1 <- Neo22_index %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = flight_number,
    values_from = c(julian, NDVI, GNDVI, EVI, temps5.26_mean, cuml5.26, gdd),
    names_sep = "_"
  )
Neo22_all<-merge(Neo22_index1, Neo_22, by="Unit")
sapply(Neo22_all, as.numeric)
Neo22_all$Location<-"Neoga 2022"


#Neo 23
Neo23_index[numeric_cols] <- lapply(Neo23_index[numeric_cols], as.numeric)
Neo23_index1 <- Neo23_index %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = flight_number,
    values_from = c(julian, NDVI, GNDVI, EVI, temps5.26_mean, cuml5.26, gdd),
    names_sep = "_"
  )
Neo23_all<-merge(Neo23_index1, Neo_23, by="Unit")
sapply(Neo23_all, as.numeric)
Neo23_all$Location<-"Neoga 2023"

ncol(Neo23_all)
ncol(Neo22_all)
ncol(Urb23_all)
ncol(Urb22_all)
ncol(StP23_all)
ncol(StP22_all)


All<-rbind(Neo23_all, Neo22_all, Urb23_all, Urb22_all, StP23_all, StP22_all)

write.csv(All, "All.csv")

getwd()
```
